response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, his resume lacks direct evidence of key required qualifications for this embedded networking and security-focused role. Specifically, there is no mention of C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, Linux kernel modification, or security technologies like MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or encryption key exchange. His experience leans heavily toward web/mobile applications and high-level languages (JavaScript, TypeScript) rather than embedded firmware or network security.
strengths: Strong general software development background with experience in multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work in collaborative, cross-functional teams
Demonstrated experience in system design and architecture across various domains
concerns: No visible experience with C programming for embedded/UNIX systems or Linux kernel modifications
No evidence of work with network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption systems)
Lacks required native-level Japanese proficiency and experience with embedded networking hardware
